falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 40) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the bottom pattern match and HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Central bank intervenes with a surprise quantitative easing announcement (confirmed via official statement)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an event would inject liquidity and invalidate the 'unknown' verdict by creating a clear bullish catalyst opposing the current pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
